title: scrophularia azerbaijanica
intro: Scrophularia azerbaijanica, also known as Azerbaijani figwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia azerbaijanica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various conditions, including colds, fever, and skin issues.
